scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix vendor-dashboard
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,VENDOR" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix vendor-dashboard"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,VENDOR" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix vendor-dashboard"
